official_site_search_notes: Built In discovery result for GitLab Data Analyst, Product was checked against GitLab's official Greenhouse posting. The official Greenhouse page loaded and displayed an Apply form.
validation_notes: Rejected 2026-04-30: official Greenhouse job URL redirects to generic GitLab openings page with error=true, and Built In detail page says this job was removed on Apr 19, 2026.
job_description:
# Data Analyst, Product
Company: GitLab
Source: Official Greenhouse posting
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Freshness source: Built In discovery result showed Reposted 7 Days Ago
URL: https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/gitlab/jobs/8455464002

## Highlights
- Remote product data analyst role supporting Product Managers, Engineering, UX, and leadership.
- Work includes defining analytical approaches, gathering data from multiple sources, product usage/customer behavior analysis, reporting for new products and features, and data model collaboration.
- Requires advanced SQL, BI dashboards/visualizations, Tableau or similar, product/engineering stakeholder partnership, data modeling support, A/B testing, and clear communication.
- Strong broad analyst fit, but not healthcare-specific.
strengths: Strong SQL, BI/dashboarding, stakeholder analytics, product metrics, and data modeling support alignment.
Official Greenhouse application page is available.
Remote role with clear data storytelling and cross-functional analytics responsibilities.
gaps: Product analytics, instrumentation, and A/B testing may be adjacent rather than direct experience.
No healthcare/payer/claims domain signal; score is lower than healthcare roles.
notes: Apply if time. Tailor toward SQL, reporting, Power BI/dashboarding, stakeholder communication, data quality, and cross-functional analysis. Keep product experimentation/A-B testing as an interest or adjacent skill unless directly supported.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Product Data Analyst | SQL Reporting | BI & Data Quality
